category_sources: Official GitHub organization describes Manticore Search as a high-performance database for search.
source_facts.description says Manticore Search is an open source text search engine.
display_name_sources: Official Manticore Search site and manual use the display name Manticore Search.
source_facts.description uses the display name Manticore Search.
docs_sources: Official Manticore Search manual is the dedicated documentation site.
Official client repositories refer users to manual.manticoresearch.com as Manticore Search server documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies open source text search engine functionality.
source_facts.executables lists indexing and search daemon tools such as indexer and searchd.
